name: rn-mvvm-guardian
description: Keep any React Native app faithful to MVVM + SOLID + best practices + conventions, and scale it up the ladder (screen-based → feature-based → modular monolith → micro-frontend). One pair (skill + agent): rn-mvvm-guardian — stack-agnostic and structure-agnostic (you choose navigation/server-state/HTTP/client-state libs), with a concrete Expo + expo-router + TanStack Query + Zustand + axios instantiation included as a copy-and-adapt worked example.
